integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the Jupyter Lab UI being interacted with, rather than just a terminal running a python script or a basic text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent computed the results dynamically rather than hardcoding the answers
integrity.visual_evidence: The code should contain actual pandas merge, groupby, and math operations. It should NOT contain hardcoded lists of the top zones (189, 57, 146, 136, 96) or hardcoded totals.

integrity.description: Verify the scatter plot was generated by the code
integrity.visual_evidence: The plot should appear as an output cell in the Jupyter notebook or be explicitly saved via a plotting library's save function (e.g., plt.savefig), not downloaded or copied from an external source.
